caption: A man with white hair and a white beard, wearing glasses and a cream-colored Nehru jacket, stands behind a wooden podium delivering a speech. The setting is indoors against a green marbled wall with geometric patterns and vertical gold-colored pillars. Two microphones are positioned on the podium in front of him. As the sequence progresses, the man uses hand gestures to emphasize his points; he initially raises his left hand, then lowers it, and subsequently raises his right index finger while speaking. He maintains a focused expression throughout the clip, looking toward his audience. The background remains static, and no text or logos are visible on screen.
